name: 12pk Unscented Jumbo TL Candles Cream - Room Essentials™: Paraffin Wax, 6.5hr Burn Time, 12 Piece Set
description:
Create an illuminated ambiance with the 12pk Fragrance Free Jumbo TL Candles Cream from Room Essentials™. These little unscented candles bring a subtle, soft brightness to any setting. Crafted from paraffin wax, each candle is made with a single wick for an approximate burn time of 6.5 hours. With a dozen in each pack, you'll have plenty of light to spread around to create a cozy atmosphere for a romantic dinner or lounging in.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
